response.justification: Although Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack development, DevOps, and software craftsmanship, he significantly lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief 6-month stint in 2014-2015, and his recent work heavily focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than the required C++, SQL Server, and Capital Markets/Fixed Income domain expertise.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) across diverse domains, including full-stack, embedded, and DevOps.
Strong background in software craftsmanship, including TDD, CI/CD pipelines, and trunk-based development.
Some exposure to the financial sector through previous work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience, with only 6 months of professional C++ experience listed from 2014-2015.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development or enterprise SQL (SQL Server/Oracle) as required.
Missing deep domain expertise in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income systems.
